name: Koala
description:
__Height:__ 160 cm (5'3")
__Debut:__ Chapter 622; Episode 541
__Occupations:__ ~!Revolutionary Army Officer; Assistant Fish-Man Karate Instructor; Slave (former)!~ 
__Residence:__ ~!Baltigo (former); Foolshout Island (former); Mary Geoise (former); Momoiro Island!~ 

Koala is a former slave who was set free by Fisher 
Tiger's rampage on Mariejois. She sailed along with the Sun Pirates to reach her home town.  First Appearance: Chapter 622; Episode 541  (source: One Piece Wikia)
